findings.issue: RESOLVED 2026-05-01 same-day: Mega-menu sweep applied across all 57 sibling pages. Kio link now lives in Recent Innovations on every page (Autri count 57 = Kio count 57 verified).
FIXED in audit pass: H2 originally read 'Tested in our own pantry first.' — 'our' is banned in user-facing copy (tone-of-voice §2 Person rule). Rewritten to 'Tested in the Fynd office first.'

Hero subhead claim '3× faster than manned POS' is sourced from the home register (index.html:312) and matches the catalog SwiftScan row, but the underlying measurement methodology is not in the Kio.pptx slide deck.
findings.fix: Acceptable for v0.1 — claim is consistent across the register and not invented here. If the methodology becomes available (timing study), cite it in v0.2.

findings.issue: '168 units locked Fashion Factory' carries Building pill in hero AND appears as 'Running today · production-hardware Kio Series running at Reliance store' in §01 Live column. The 168 units are not yet shipped — they are locked. Status is correctly Building. Live column does not claim 168 units, only the Malad pilot. No overclaim.
findings.fix: No change required. Pill discipline is correct.

strengths: Hero is clean: Number + scope + differentiator. 'Pilot Malad live · 168 units locked Fashion Factory · ~₹18 Cr FY26-27' opens the lead with the most credible verifiable facts.
Hardware specs (§07) are verbatim from the source datasheet (slides 10 + 12). FKAP1/FKAP2 SoC, NPU TOPS, RAM, OS versions all preserved without editorialising — Apex-grade datasheet.
Honesty contract holds: Live (Malad pilot + SnacAdda + Swift Module) is distinct from Building (Fashion Factory rollout) is distinct from Roadmap (Beauty + Grocery pilots). No tier mixing.
SnacAdda case study (§06) names the team, the venue (WeWork Andheri Mumbai), and the metric (50+ items/min) — three Reliance-style identifiable signals.
Section ordering follows the canonical 0→07 register, with documented overrides (no §08 Sources block per the website-tone-of-voice default-no rule, recorded as D4 in spec).
